name: Kaito Kōjin
bio: Believes that true freedom can only be achieved through individual autonomy and the rejection of external constraints.

name: Akane Akatsuki
bio: Seeks to understand the intricacies of human nature and the role of individual agency in shaping society.
speech_style: Soft-spoken with a hint of uncertainty

name: Tōru Tatsuhashi
bio: Fights for the rights of marginalized groups, believing that true freedom can only be achieved through collective action.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
